calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-01-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Plaintiffs Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar May-02-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Stephen M. Murphy, Clerk: J. Bertelsen, Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR# 8098.
Craig Miller, Esq., appearing for Plaintiffs Weisberg & Miller, William S. Weisberg, and Craig S. Miller.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Arden Intengan.
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-10 dismissed.
Witness William Steven Weisberg sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:

Damages: $82,840.02
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0
Attorney's Fees: $0
Costs: $910.06
Total Judgment in the amount of $83,750.08
Judgment signed in open court.

MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to Oct-18-2016 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk RWoods. Proceedings not reported. (610)
